userMessage: Suggest the best acquisition settings for capturing a 1MHz square wave with minimal aliasing on my MSO6B

response.text:
Best-fit acquisition setup for minimal aliasing is sample mode with FastAcq off, continuous run, plus a max sample-rate check.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Updated the acquisition step for minimal aliasing on the MSO6B and added a max-sample-rate readback.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_step","targetStepId":"5","newStep":{"type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition for minimal aliasing","params":{"command":"ACQuire:MODe SAMple;ACQuire:FASTAcq:STATE OFF;ACQuire:STOPAfter RUNSTop;ACQuire:STATE RUN"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"5","newStep":{"type":"query","label":"Read max sample rate","params":{"command":"ACQuire:MAXSamplerate?","saveAs":"max_sample_rate"}}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Updated the acquisition step for minimal aliasing on the MSO6B and added a max-sample-rate readback.
